source: Anthropic Claude (Claude Code / Enterprise, list token pricing)
method: claude-api skill SKILL.md model table + official Anthropic pricing page https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/pricing.md (verified 2026-07-01). Added Claude Sonnet 5 (launched 2026-06-30).

models.notes: 5m cache write $6.25/MTok (1.25x); 1h cache write $10/MTok (2x); cache read $0.50/MTok (0.1x). Output price covers thinking tokens (no separate thinking/non-thinking rate). 1M context window at standard pricing (no long-context premium). 128K max output. Batch API: $2.50 in / $12.50 out (50% off). Fast mode (research preview): $10 in / $50 out.

Same token pricing as Opus 4.8. 5m cache write $6.25/MTok; 1h cache write $10/MTok; cache read $0.50/MTok. Output incl. thinking. 1M context at standard pricing. Batch API: $2.50 in / $12.50 out. Fast mode (research preview): $30 in / $150 out.

Same token pricing as Opus 4.7/4.8. 5m cache write $6.25/MTok; 1h cache write $10/MTok; cache read $0.50/MTok. Output incl. thinking. 1M context at standard pricing. Batch API: $2.50 in / $12.50 out. Fast mode (research preview): $30 in / $150 out.

Launched 2026-06-30, drop-in replacement for Sonnet 4.6 at the same STANDARD price ($3/$15). INTRODUCTORY promo through 2026-08-31: input $2 / output $10 / cache read $0.20 / 5m cache write $2.50 (reverts to standard $3/$15/$0.30/$3.75 on 2026-09-01; 1h cache write $6). Output incl. thinking (adaptive thinking ON by default; effort param low/medium/high/xhigh/max — manual budget_tokens + sampling params now 400). 1M context, 128K max output; new tokenizer ~30% more tokens per text. Batch API: $1.50 in / $7.50 out standard. Live at launch on AWS Bedrock (anthropic.claude-sonnet-5), Google Vertex, Azure Foundry (preview); EU regional/multi-region +10%. AA Intelligence Index 53 (max effort).

Highest Sonnet > 4.5. 5m cache write $3.75/MTok (1.25x); 1h cache write $6/MTok (2x); cache read $0.30/MTok (0.1x). Output incl. thinking. 1M context at standard pricing. 64K max output. Batch API: $1.50 in / $7.50 out. No Fast mode.

Claude 5 / Mythos-class tier, above Opus. Most capable widely released model. 5m cache write $12.50/MTok (1.25x); 1h cache write $20/MTok (2x); cache read $1/MTok (0.1x). Output incl. thinking (thinking always on). 1M context at standard pricing. 128K max output. Batch API: $5 in / $25 out. Requires 30-day data retention. Claude Mythos 5 (claude-mythos-5, Project Glasswing only) has identical pricing.

plan_notes: These are first-party Claude Developer Platform (API) list/standard per-token prices in USD per 1M tokens. This is what an enterprise consuming the API or Claude Code via API key (token-metered) pays. Claude Code can be driven either by API token metering (these rates) or via a Claude subscription seat (Pro/Team/Max/Enterprise) where usage is bundled into the seat with usage caps rather than per-token billing. Claude Code Enterprise is sold as a seat-based subscription (per-user seats, sold via Anthropic enterprise sales, custom volume pricing) that bundles Claude Code usage; large/heavy enterprise consumption is typically run against the API at these per-token rates (or negotiated volume discounts). Prompt-caching: cache write = 1.25x base input (5m) or 2x (1h); cache read (hit) = 0.1x base input. Batch API = 50% discount on both input and output. 1M context window included at standard pricing for Fable 5, Opus 4.6/4.7/4.8, and Sonnet 4.6 (no long-context surcharge). US-only data residency (inference_geo='us') adds a 1.1x multiplier on all categories for Opus 4.6+/Sonnet 4.6+; global (default) is standard. Thinking vs non-thinking: no pricing difference — output tokens (including thinking) are billed at the single output rate. Note: Opus 4.7+ uses a new tokenizer that may produce up to ~35% more tokens for the same text vs earlier models.
